raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "N Affus darrija / kaē
pareiſi bija / un tam
KUNGAM ſarwam
Deewam labbi patikke/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un atnehme to Sweſchu
Altarus/ un tohs Augſtumus/un
nolausija tohs Bildu Stabbus /
un nozirte tohs Elka Meschus/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un pawehleja teem no
Juhda/ ka teem biſ to KUNGU
tawo Tehwo Deewu niekleht/un
to Bauſlibu un Pawehlefchann
padarriht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſchatnehme no wiſ-
feem Juhda Pilſtahteem tohs
Augſtumus un Deetwektus / jo
ta Walſtiba bija winna Preek-
ſchá ar Meeru.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wiꞥſch arri uſtaifija ſtip-
rus Pilſfahtus eekſch Juhda/ jo
ta Seimne bija ar Meeru/ un
tanuſs Gaddôs ne bija Karſch
prett winnu/ jo tas KUNGS
Dewe winnam Duſſetchanu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz fazzija wiꞥſch ue
Juhdu : Uſtaifijim ſchohs Pilſ-
fahtus/ un darrifim Muhrus ap-
fahrt/ un Turkus/ Wahrtis un
Preekſchtchanjamus/ kamehr ta
Seimne wehl muhſu Preekſchá
wr/ jo mehſ effam to KUNGU
muhſu Deewu metklejſchi / mehſ
effam metklejſchi/ un wiꞥſch ter
nume wiſſapfahrt Duſſetchanu
dewis. Ta uſtaifija tee/ un teem
labbi iſdewahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Affum bija weene
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un prett teem zehlehſ
ruſ tas Mohru Kehniſch
weenu Karra-Spehku/ no
ſtoſch reisi tuhkſtoſcheem/ u
trihſ ſimts Ratteem / un t
lihds Maresai.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet Affus tegahje
pretti/ un tee taifija tohs Ka
Pulkus eekſch tahs Eeleija
watas pee Maresas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Affus peefauze
KUNGU ſawu Deewu/ un
ziia: KUNGS / tew n
(gruhts) palihdſeht / jeb
daudſeim/ jeb tam / kam
ka newaid. Palihds m
KUNGS muhſu Deewu
mehſ paſtanjamess us tewi
eekſch tawa Wahrda effam
nahkuſchi prett jcho leeſu Pu
ak KUNGS! tu effi m
Deews/ prett tew nekahds
weks ko eespehj.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS
ziia tohs Mohru Laudis pre
Affu un preekſch Juhdu/ u
Mohru Laudis behdſe.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Affus ar teem
dim/ kas pee ta bija dsin
teem pakkat lihds Gerarai/u
Mohru Laudis kritte/ ka n
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
